questions.question: What type of database is MongoDB?
What format does MongoDB use to store documents internally?
In MongoDB, what is a Collection equivalent to in a relational database?
Which method is used to insert a single document into a MongoDB collection?
What does the '_id' field represent in a MongoDB document?
questions.optionA: A foreign key linking to another collection
questions.optionC: The unique primary key for the document
questions.optionD: An optional field for document ordering

questions.question: Which MongoDB CRUD method retrieves the first document that matches a filter?
Which update operator is used to increment a numeric field value in MongoDB?
What does the $gt comparison operator do in a MongoDB query?
questions.optionA: Matches values greater than or equal to the specified value
questions.optionB: Matches values greater than the specified value
questions.optionC: Matches values less than the specified value

questions.question: Which aggregation stage is used to filter documents in a pipeline, similar to a WHERE clause?
What does the $group stage in an aggregation pipeline do?
questions.optionA: Filters documents based on a condition
questions.optionB: Sorts documents in a specific order
questions.optionC: Groups documents by a specified key and calculates aggregate values

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Projection in a MongoDB find() query?
questions.optionB: To specify which fields to include or exclude from results
questions.optionC: To limit the number of documents returned

questions.question: Which MongoDB query operator checks if an array field contains ALL of the specified elements?
What is the primary trade-off when creating indexes in MongoDB?
questions.optionA: Indexes improve both read and write performance equally
questions.optionB: Indexes improve read speed but consume memory and slow down write operations
questions.optionC: Indexes only work on string fields
questions.optionD: Indexes reduce storage space but slow down reads

questions.question: Which of the following methods is used to paginate results in MongoDB?
In MongoDB's aggregation framework, which stage is used to perform a LEFT OUTER JOIN with another collection?
What does the winningPlan.stage value 'COLLSCAN' indicate in explain() output?
questions.optionA: The query is using an index efficiently
questions.optionB: The query is performing a full collection scan with no index
questions.optionD: The collection is being scanned from a secondary replica

questions.question: Which update operator removes a specific field from a MongoDB document?
When using insertMany() in MongoDB, what happens by default if one document fails validation?
questions.optionA: MongoDB skips the error and inserts all other documents
questions.optionB: MongoDB stops inserting at the first error by default (ordered: true)
questions.optionC: MongoDB rolls back all previously inserted documents
questions.optionD: MongoDB retries the failed document up to 3 times

questions.question: Which MongoDB horizontal scaling mechanism distributes data across multiple servers?
In an aggregation $group stage, which accumulator would you use to calculate the average of a numeric field?
A query uses db.orders.find({status:'active', createdAt:{$gte:ISODate('2024-01-01')}}).sort({createdAt:-1}). Following the ESR rule, what is the ideal compound index?

A document in a users collection has a 'scores' array of embedded objects with 'subject' and 'score' fields. Which query correctly finds users with a math score of 90 or above using a SINGLE element match condition?
You need a TTL index that auto-deletes session documents 1 hour after creation. Which command is correct?
In an aggregation pipeline processing sales data, which ordering of stages gives the BEST performance when you need to $match, then $group, then $sort?
A developer stores unlimited user activity logs as an ever-growing array inside a single user document. Which problem will this pattern inevitably cause in MongoDB?
questions.optionA: Query operators like $in will stop working on the array
questions.optionB: The document will eventually exceed MongoDB's 16MB BSON document size limit
questions.optionC: MongoDB will automatically archive old array elements
questions.optionD: Indexes on array fields will be invalidated after 1000 elements
